source.note: The canonical 4K PNG is never cropped or altered. Execution derives a 720x1280 model adapter because Gemini Omni Flash Preview supports 720p reference images.

reference.transformation: Lanczos scale from canonical 2160x3840 PNG to model-supported 720x1280 PNG; no crop.
